reason: Successfully sent a math question to the QA agent and received the correct response containing "4"
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully with sidebar showing agents
Located and clicked on agent "QA-20260527-223348-27jx" in the sidebar — Agent page loaded and displayed
Verified agent status — Status shows "idle" which meets the requirement (running or idle)
Typed message "Hello! What is 2+2?" in the message input field — Message appeared in the input field
Clicked the send button — Message was sent successfully and chat view opened with the message displayed in the conversation
Waited for agent response — Agent responded in approximately 1 second (well within the 3-minute timeout)
Verified response content — Agent returned "4" as the response, which correctly mentions the expected answer to the math question
Captured screenshot — Full page screenshot taken showing the conversation with user message "Hello! What is 2+2?" and agent response "4", with agent status showing "idle" and timing "Worked for 1s"
